finding_results.notes: Raised contraction density in Ravi/Anika pressure dialogue (we'll, don't, wasn't, didn't, I'm) and rewrote Priya's 351-387 stretch away from consecutive legalistic declaratives into a boundary-focused colloquial cadence while keeping specificity.

Rebuilt refusal cadence so each beat shifts leverage: agreement breach (87/105), relational boundary (167), bodily limit (171), and exit consequence (191). Removed standalone one-word refusal lines in the 83-191 window.

summary: All packet findings for the dialogue/idiolect/cadence pass were resolved in chapter 13 with targeted register, cadence, and leverage-beat revisions while preserving continuity constraints.
